title: Jirachi's Millennium Crystal
description: Adds a creative and unique way to spawn Jirachi without natural spawning
body:
![Millennium Crystal](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9170c86055a72c0a1e7659fb81232897543ede_0.webp)

**Adds a very creative and unique way to summon Jirachi without affecting the natural spawning in a more immersive and lore-wise way.**

_Inspired by the movie Jirachi the Wish Maker, this DataPack brings the Millennium Crystal, known for contain Jirachi inside it sleeping deeply until The Millennium Comet reaches the earth.
Legends says that the eye in his stomach has the power to make wishes become real, but careful, because a rotten heart wish could turn your most precious treasure into a corrupted monster_

To obtain the crystal, you must follow the recipe in order to craft it.

![Recipe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/4f24da14c130b258c06085c59b06dbb70db0ceaf.png)
